creator: rodperson@rodperson.com
text:
On 03/27/2013 1:00 AM, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of graphics/fotoxx,
>
> Please note that PR ports/177407 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/177407
>

The newer version of Fotoxx requires gtk 3.2 to build.  I'm working on 
trying to get it to build with the version currently available in ports.

-- 

Rod Person  http://www.rodperson.com  rodperson@rodperson.com
